message:
fix(gateway): resolve TypeScript exactOptionalPropertyTypes error (bd-1hcr)

Changed `sessionId?: string` to `sessionId: string | undefined` in the
JobService.starting map type to properly handle the case where job.sessionId
can be undefined.

With exactOptionalPropertyTypes enabled, `string | undefined` is not
assignable to optional `string?` - the explicit union type is required.

Tests: 26 pass, 0 fail (job.service.test.ts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
